title: hypericum helianthemoides subsp. atropatanum
intro: Hypericum helianthemoides subsp. atropatanum, also known as Iranian St. John's Wort, is a plant species belonging to the Hypericum genus, characterized by its yellow flowers and medicinal properties. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, it is known for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Hypericum helianthemoides subsp. atropatanum include its ability to reduce pain, lower inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
